source_pr.title: executor, plan: convert Limit to TableDual when meet `limit 0`
source_pr.body:
Fix #5341 
Before this PR: 
``` sql
create table t(a char);
insert into t value('a');
select * from test.t where a < 1 order by a limit 0;
```
``` sql
+----------------+--------------+----------------+------+----------------------------------------------+-------+
| id             | parents      | children       | task | operator info                                | count |
+----------------+--------------+----------------+------+----------------------------------------------+-------+
| TableScan_15   |              |                | cop  | table:t, range:[-inf,+inf], keep order:false | 1.00  |
| TableReader_16 | Selection_14 |                | root | data:TableScan_15                            | 1.00  |
| Selection_14   | TopN_10      | TableReader_16 | root | lt(cast(test.t.a), 1)                        | 0.80  |
| TopN_10        |              | Selection_14   | root | test.t.a:asc, offset:0, count:0              | 0.00  |
+----------------+--------------+----------------+------+----------------------------------------------+-------+
```
This sql will get panic message as #5341 shows,
cause TopN cannot be pushed down, and the check [here](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/executor/sort.go#L401) will be true.

PTAL @coocood @zz-jason

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from test.t where a < 1 order by a limit 0;").Check(testkit.Rows()) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from test.t where a < 1 order by a limit 0;").Check(testkit.Rows()) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR fixes a deterministic correctness/panic issue around `LIMIT 0` planning (convert Limit to TableDual). The case does not provide a flaky-test failure signature or a targeted stabilization change, so we avoid guessing a nondeterministic-order root cause category.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from test.t where a < 1 order by a limit 0;").Check(testkit.Rows()) (executor/executor_test.go)
